Recruit Method: Dialog with any wandering NPC near a forest. Mention you have an axe and a camp. Charisma check (DC 8).
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_logging_camp.
Behavior: Walks to nearest assigned tree node within 80m of camp; chops; deposits wood_log into nearest storage chest; idles in lumber camp.
Notes: Most common roadside NPC. Gives +5 wood_log/day baseline; doubles if 2 trees within range.

Recruit Method: Dialog with NPC near a rock outcrop or in a mining camp. Show pickaxe in inventory. Charisma DC 8.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_mining_outpost.
Behavior: Patrols ore vein nodes within build_mining_outpost radius; mines on cooldown; deposits to nearest chest.

Recruit Method: Dialog with NPC near tilled soil or a ruined village. Charisma DC 8.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_field.
Behavior: Tends herb planters / fields; harvests on grow tick; deposits to nearest chest.

Recruit Method: Dialog with hunter NPC. Survival check (DC 10) or already have hunting.trapping.3.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius.
Behavior: Resets player-placed snares; gathers carcasses into chest.
Notes: Cross-profession unlock (Hunting branch). Halves player trap upkeep time.

Recruit Method: Dialog with NPC gathering wild plants. Charisma DC 7.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius.
Behavior: Collects scrub berries / mushrooms within camp radius.
Notes: Cross-profession unlock (Gathering branch). +3 herb_common/day + small food yield.

Recruit Method: Dialog with traveling merchant. Charisma DC 9. Show 50 gold of inventory.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus a built market stall.
Behavior: Mans build_market_stall; auto-sells items flagged 'sell-junk' from stall chest at end of day.
Notes: Required to man any market stall. Without a vendor stalls are decorative only.

Recruit Method: Dialog with caravan NPC at a trade post. Reputation neutral or better with at least one faction. Charisma DC 11.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_caravan_cart.
Behavior: Drives build_caravan_cart between trade posts; converts excess stockpile into gold (passive route).
Notes: Required for trade_post passive gold to actually flow. Routes set in town menu.

Recruit Method: Dialog only after committing 3+ theft acts visible to the Fence. No charisma check — they find YOU.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_market_complex.
Behavior: Mans Black Market stall; buys stolen / contraband items at +50% over normal vendor price.
Notes: Required for theft loot to be salable. Spawns only after build_market_complex.

Recruit Method: Dialog at any active Grand Bazaar. Reputation friendly with a major faction. Charisma DC 13.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_grand_bazaar.
Behavior: Mans a Grand Bazaar slot; offers rotating rare-goods inventory daily; takes consignments.

Recruit Method: Dialog with armed wanderer. Combat check (DC 8) or show a ranged weapon equipped.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_watchtower.
Behavior: Mans build_watchtower; pings minimap on hostile detection; fires basic crossbow.

Recruit Method: Dialog with mercenary NPC at a settlement. Resolve check (DC 10).
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_gate_iron or build_palisade.
Behavior: Patrols build_gate_iron / build_palisade segments; engages anything hostile that crosses.
Notes: Two-pack hire (pair) — each one needs their own tent.

Recruit Method: Dialog with veteran fighter at a faction outpost. Combat DC 12 or already crafted a turret.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_turret_basic or heavy.
Behavior: Mans build_turret_basic / heavy; +30% turret accuracy and +20% fire rate while assigned.
Notes: One gunner per turret. Without a gunner turrets fire at base accuracy.

Recruit Method: Dialog with armed wanderer. Charisma DC 10 + Resolve DC 8. Reputation neutral or better.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius.
Behavior: Follows player as party companion (party slot); fights alongside; uses equipped loadout.
Notes: Party follower — does NOT count against recruit cap; counts against follower slots from Leadership.

Recruit Method: Dialog only after slaying a named enemy captain or completing a faction war contract. Resolve DC 14.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus a Fortress (defenses.4).
Behavior: Elite party companion; commands up to 3 NPC squad members in fortress defense; rallies morale +10% in radius.
Notes: Captain leads a 3-NPC squad that mans build_keep_gate. Each squad member needs a tent.

Recruit Method: Dialog with faction NPC. Reputation friendly with at least one faction. Charisma DC 12.
Camp Requirement: 1 personal tent + shared campfire + shared storage crate + claim flag in radius. Plus build_embassy.
Behavior: Stationed in build_embassy; passively raises faction reputation +1/day for that faction.
Notes: One per embassy. Required for faction gift caravans (diplomacy.4).
